name: Moist Chocolate Cake
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup buttermilk (or regular milk mixed with a tablespoon of vinegar)
recipeInstructions:
Cake:
1. Sift the cocoa powder and all-purpose flour together three times.
2. In a large bowl, mix the sugar, vegetable oil, eggs, buttermilk, baking soda, and vanilla extract until well combined.
3. Gradually add the sifted cocoa and flour mixture to the wet ingredients, stirring continuously.
4. Add the boiling water last and stir gently to combine all ingredients into a thin batter.
5. Grease and flour a 10-inch bundt pan.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
7. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 45 minutes, or until done. Check after 45 minutes and continue checking every few minutes until fully cooked but not overcooked.
8. Remove from oven and invert onto a rack to cool completely.
Icing:
1. In a saucepan, combine the sugar, cocoa powder, and sweetened milk. Cook over medium heat until the mixture thickens slightly.
2. Remove from heat and stir in the softened butter until smooth.
3. Add vanilla extract and stir again.
4. Allow the icing to cool slightly before pouring it over the top of the cooled cake, letting it drip down the sides.
